overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a player walking through a lush wilderness meadow with a stream, encountering and observing a deer grazing, then continuing to explore the natural environment with snow-capped mountains in the background.

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow stream water surrounded by tall grass and wildflowers

entered.detail: shallow creek with clear water flowing through grassy meadow
dense evergreen trees forming the backdrop of the meadow
large rocky formation partially covered with moss

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view wading through a shallow stream in a lush wilderness area. Tall grass and wildflowers surround the water, with a dense pine forest visible in the background under a partly cloudy sky.

events.description: exits the stream onto the grassy bank of the meadow

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass on the meadow bank, approaching a deer in the distance

entered.detail: distant mountain range with snow-covered peaks visible beyond the tree line

segments.scene_description: The camera moves out of the stream onto a grassy meadow bank. As the perspective shifts, snow-capped mountains become visible in the distant background beyond the pine forest, and the stream recedes behind the field of view.

events.description: deer enters the meadow from the right side of the frame
deer stops walking and begins grazing on the tall grass

agents.ego_description: slowly approaching and observing a deer grazing in the tall grass, maintaining a respectful distance

notable_agents.action: deer walking through the meadow, then stopping to graze on the grass

segments.scene_description: A deer enters the meadow and becomes the focal point as the camera approaches slowly. The deer grazes peacefully in the tall grass while snow-capped mountains loom larger in the background as the camera advances.

events.description: player approaches a common bulrush plant to pick and examine it

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the stream bank through the meadow, examining wild plants and the natural surroundings

entered.detail: creek flowing through the meadow with visible rocks in the water

segments.scene_description: After the deer moves away, the camera continues exploring along the stream bank. The player approaches a common bulrush plant for examination, with the stream flowing alongside and the pine forest now visible to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a shallow stream through a lush meadow toward a distant mountain range. It begins by wading through clear water surrounded by wildflowers and tall grass, with a dense pine forest framing the horizon under a partly cloudy sky. As the camera moves onto the grassy bank, the stream recedes and the view expands to reveal towering snow-capped mountains looming beyond the trees. The perspective then shifts to focus on a grazing deer in the meadow, approaching the animal slowly as the mountains grow more prominent in the background. Finally, after the deer departs, the camera continues along the water's edge to examine a common bulrush plant with the pine forest now shifting to the right.
